articles.title: 26-year-old identified as man killed by police in Lexington
articles.description:
Police responded to a home in Lexington on Saturday after a resident reported that their son had injured himself with a knife, the DA said previously.

The post 26-year-old identified as man killed by police in Lexington appeared first on Boston.com.
